title: クリアとホワイト、パキッとフレンチ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an attempt to grow closer to Tosen Jordan, I've started looking into
what's trending these days. Today, I've made my way to the shopping
mall.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Checking the trends, huh? But why? Doesn't that stuff just naturally
make its way to you?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like, your friends will share it, or it shows up on your feed. They just
keep coming, one after another.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're taking notes? Just stop. Please. I can't.
This is your day off, yeah? You shouldn't spend it studying and junk.
choice_data_list: Are you here to do some shopping?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I guess so... Actually, if you wanna know the trends, I know a
super easy way to figure that out.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Guess we're switching roles. Today, I'm gonna be your Trend Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, I'm suddenly embarking upon Trend Training with
Tosen Jordan...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
First stop, the photo booth! Gotta take a pic while my hair and
makeup are still on fleek. A selfie's good too, but photo booths just
hit different, you know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about the pose suggestions and all that stuff. Which one
should we do? Better just stick to the usual for your first time, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Here. Pose like this. Easy, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Stiff much? It's giving dead body. Come on, vibe with me here. Think,
"I'm the cutest in the whole world!"

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Got it? If your heart's not in it, your face will show it. Now let's try
that again. Get into iiit!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Ah, that top is high-key cute. And it's cropped at juuust the
right length. Adorable as hell.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Are you for real? If I try it on, I'll just want it more. And do you see those prices? Little bougie for my allowance. No way.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Instead, I've gotta burn this fit into my mind. Later, I'll try to find
something with a similar vibe that I can actually afford.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Like, "I won't forget you." Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ha... Would it kill you to laugh at my jokes? Anyway, let's get going.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah, that top is such a serve! I've been meaning to grab something oversized! And it's so cheap. Yup, you're mine now.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I can't tell if you've got more cool or warm undertones... Not
that it matters too much. Your glow-up is all but guaranteed with me
in charge.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Let's go with an orange eyeshadow... And a little glitter... Now some
white eyeliner on your waterline. Can't forget the pink mascara to
make your eyes pop!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Come on, if anything, I should be putting on more. If that's how you're gonna thank me... I'm giving you a unibrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After my impromptu makeover, we spend the rest of the day hanging
out, and I learn more about Jordan's world.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Now that hit the spot. Frappes slap so hard... And the new flavors here are always on point.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So? How was today? This is how I always spend my days off. You
know, wandering around, eating and goofing around on my
smartphone.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But... I'm sure it was a real bore for you, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Low-key... you looked like you were about to burst an artery most of
today. I'm guessing this was all totally foreign to you, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I had a hard time keeping up with all these new experiences,
but I thought I'd hid that well... I guess not.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah. But to be honest, I was so worried about you that I didn't
really have as much fun either.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean... It's not like I didn't have any fun.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, it's pretty clear now, right? We're like, total opposites.
Practically from other planets.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
We're not gonna laugh at the same stuff, so, like, it's okay to stop
trying.
choice_data_list: So you knew what I was doing, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm dumb, but I'm not blind. Anyway, I appreciate the thought, so... give it a rest, okay?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: We don't have to vibe outside of training. We can just practice and go home, you know?
choice_data_list: Well, I think I'll keep trying anyway.
Well, I think I'll keep trying anyway.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why?
choice_data_list: Because I want to know you better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure, it was hard to keep up, but the novelty of each experience kept
things interesting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And in the end, I learned more about Tosen Jordan. Today was well
worth it for that alone, so I tell her as much.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I can tell when you're lying, you know.
choice_data_list:
My face may say otherwise, but my heart speaks
the truth!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Seriously... You are so weird.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Isn't all that studying super boring though? Wouldn't it be easier just
to kick back and relax?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, that's what happened to me when I tried watching this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She pulls out a video rental shop bag and shoves it into my hands.
Looking inside, I find a DVD of Comedy Derby, the show I told her
about.
choice_data_list: Did you watch this for me?
Did you watch this for me?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but I didn't enjoy it. Your sense of humor is hella sus... But
seeing you bomb your UmaTok impression got me curious.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Do you know how long it's been since I've rented a DVD? It took
sooo much time to find too. Recommend something online next time.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Come on, why'd that make you smile?! Anyway, could you return that DVD for me? I'm out! Thanks for the frappe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod and wave a quick goodbye to her before sitting back, satisfied.
Finally, it feels like I've grown closer to Tosen Jordan—even if only by
a teensy bit.
